method_description: Melt and refine direct reduced iron into crude steel using an electric arc furnace with scrap blending.
evidence_summary: Pilot split from the aggregate H2 DRI electric steel route plus electric finishing benchmarks; values are indicative topology-test data.
derivation_method: Reduced-form decomposition split. Aggregate H2 DRI route electricity, scrap, and finishing emissions are separated from upstream DRI production.
review_notes: Main finishing route paired with H2 shaft-furnace DRI in the decomposition pilot.

method_description: Melt and refine DRI into crude steel using an electric smelter style finishing route.
evidence_summary: Pilot split from the aggregate H2 DRI electric steel route plus electric finishing benchmarks; values are indicative topology-test data.
derivation_method: Reduced-form decomposition split. Aggregate H2 DRI route electricity, scrap, and finishing emissions are separated from upstream DRI production.
review_notes: Alternative finishing route included to test interchangeable methods for the finishing child role.
